creator: iSavaDev@gmail.com
text:
===>  Deinstalling for www/apache22
===>   Deinstalling apache22-2.2.25_1
/usr/local/etc/apache22/httpd.conf
pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/share/doc/apache22/style/xsl/util' doesn't exist
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '/usr/local/share/doc/apache22/style/xsl/util'
pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/share/doc/apache22/style/xsl' doesn't exist
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '/usr/local/share/doc/apache22/style/xsl'
pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/share/doc/apache22/style/lang' doesn't exist
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '/usr/local/share/doc/apache22/style/lang'
pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package `apache22-2.2.25_1'
(perhaps the packing list is incorrectly specified?)

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/www/apache22
make deinstall
